title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
posterAlt: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets (2002) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Cars fly, trees fight back, and a mysterious house-elf comes to warn Harry Potter at the start of his second year at Hogwarts. Adventure and danger await when bloody writing on a wall announces: The Chamber Of Secrets Has Been Opened. To save Hogwarts will require all of Harry, Ron and Hermione's magical abilities and courage.
synopsis: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets (2002) is a adventure and fantasy film from United Kingdom and United States. It holds a solid 7.5 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
